plan_metadata.name: group  debug in teams remote tdp

steps.description: Press the F1 key in Visual Studio Code to open the command palette.
Type 'Debug: Select and Start Debugging' into the Visual Studio Code Command Palette input box at the top of the window.
Press Enter to select "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" from the command palette in Visual Studio Code.
Type #text:'View Remote App in Teams (Chrome)' into the debug configuration dropdown at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface, within the Microsoft 365 Agents project workspace.
Press Enter to select "View Remote App in Teams (Chrome)" from the debug configuration dropdown in Visual Studio Code.
Click inside the "Password" input field on the Microsoft login page to focus and enable password entry.
Type  ${{secret:M365_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD}} into the password input field on the Microsoft sign-in page for user  ${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_NAME}}.
Press the "Enter" key to submit the Microsoft login form on the "Enter password" page, focusing on the "Sign in" button interaction.
Click the "Yes" button on the "Stay signed in?" prompt, located within the Microsoft login interface.
Click the “Add” button within the app details  in Microsoft Teams (web interface), indicated by a blue button below the app name and publisher.
Click the "Open" button in the pop-up dialog for the  app on the Microsoft Teams web interface.
